metadata.description: Plugin marketplace for the cjhowe-us artifact + workflow ecosystem.

plugins.name: artifact-plugin
plugins.description: Artifact primitives for Claude Code: schemes, backends, templates, graph. Zero plugin deps. URI format: <scheme>|<backend>/<path>.

plugins.name: artifact-github-plugin
plugins.description: GitHub backends for the artifact plugin: gh-pr, gh-issue, gh-release, gh-milestone, gh-tag, gh-branch, gh-gist. Exposes shared `auth_status` helper for cross-plugin identity. Requires artifact-plugin.

plugins.name: artifact-documents-plugin
plugins.description: Document scheme + filesystem/Confluence backends + eight markdown templates (design, plan, review, release, test, requirement, user-story, triage). Requires artifact-plugin.

plugins.name: workflow-plugin
plugins.description: Workflow orchestration plugin. `/workflow` entry skill, worker agent, four base workflows (default, conductor, plan-do, write-review) with conditional steps, execution scheme + execution-gh-pr backend, presence scheme + presence-gh-gist backend, shared TTL-cached GitHub auth. First-run seed always chains into the tutor. Dashboard reports installed workflows/templates/schemes/storages from the registry. Requires artifact-plugin.

plugins.name: rumdl-plugin
plugins.description: Markdown linting and formatting via rumdl: LSP server, PostToolUse fmt hook, and the markdown coding-standard skill.

plugins.name: python-plugin
plugins.description: Python toolchain plugin: ruff + mypy + pytest + uv PostToolUse hooks, missing-test detector (Claude Code + git pre-commit), and a unified `python` skill alongside per-tool skills (python-ruff, python-mypy, python-uv, python-pytest, python-pypi) for fine-grained enablement.
